title: Any dublicate
description: Do you want to duplicate a cool item? Then this mod is for you, with it you can duplicate any item.
body:
## shapeless clot 
it can only be obtained at the end. You can use it to duplicate items in the duplicator.

pic:
![Ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d4e98873f50b41e372eb1ac306f13bbe50f0a47.jpeg)
## duplicator 
a block with an interface where you can accurately duplicate objects using a Shapeless Blob

interface:
